[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000010 3
1 10001010 3
2 10000100 2
3 11010111 6
4 00101010 3
5 11000101 4
6 11011111 7
7 11111111 a

56 65 11111111 a match 7

70 07 00110100 3
